sprite / detail

create.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00006 // No include guards by design.
00007 
00008 #ifndef BOOST_PP_IS_ITERATING
00009   #error "Do not include this file directly"
00010 #else
00011   // N is the number of parameters.  The create function is overloaded for
00012   // various numbers of parameters (which are all forwarded to rewrite).
00013   #define N BOOST_PP_ITERATION()
00014   
00015   // Documented in struct Node.
00016   template<TagValue Value BOOST_PP_ENUM_TRAILING_PARAMS(N,typename T)>
00017   inline NodePtr Node::create(
00018       BOOST_PP_ENUM_BINARY_PARAMS(N,T,const & t)
00019     )
00020   {
00021     // Initializes the refcount, leaves the tag and other members
00022     // uninitialized.
00023     Node * p = new AbstractNode();
00024   
00025     // TODO -- if rewrite were made nothrow, then this try block could be
00026     // eliminated.
00027 
00028     // Initializes the tag, payload and other members.  The tag is used to
00029     // destroy the payload, so it must be initialized before p can be deleted
00030     // with a normal call to delete.
00031     try
00032       { rewrite<Value>()(*p BOOST_PP_ENUM_TRAILING_PARAMS(N,t)); }
00033     catch(...)
00034     {
00035       // Node::delete, i.e., not the same as "delete p".  This does not call
00036       // ~Node, so the Node constructor must not have claimed resources.
00037       operator delete(p);
00038       throw;
00039     }
00040     NodePtr q = NodePtr(p);
00041     return q;
00042   }
00043 
00044   #undef N
00045 #endif
